Enum FormLocation

Enumerates values that specify the position on screen at which IAlertPanels are displayed.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.AlertPanels
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public enum FormLocation

Fields

Name Description
BottomLeft

An alert panel appears at the bottom left corner of the screen.
BottomRight

An alert panel appears at the bottom right corner of the screen.
TopLeft

An alert panel appears at the top left corner of the screen.
TopRight

An alert panel appears at the top right corner of the screen.
